description: Build output is chunked (ui.js, ui2-ui114) instead of preserveModules tree. package.json exports point to non-existent dist/es/ and dist/cjs/ paths. Package is not installable as published.
root_cause: vite.config.ts uses single output object with formats: ['es', 'cjs'] instead of array of output configs with separate dir per format
prevention: Use rollupOptions.output as array with separate dir: 'dist/es' and dir: 'dist/cjs'

description: CI workflow (ci.yml) runs lint, typecheck, and build but never runs npm test. 772 tests are invisible to the pipeline.
root_cause: test job was never added to ci.yml

description: 4 components have default exports (AddressCard, PaymentMethodCard, CategoryIcon, CategoryIconRow) violating named-exports-only rule
Skeleton.module.scss uses deprecated darken() function instead of sass:color module
root_cause: Convention not enforced at lint level
prevention: Document in project-conventions.md, add to spawn prompts

description: CLAUDE.md token documentation is out of sync with actual tokens.scss. Color values, spacing names, z-index names and values all differ.
root_cause: tokens.scss was modified without updating CLAUDE.md
prevention: Add CLAUDE.md sync check to Phase 8
